name: Mage

abilities.name: Fireball
abilities.desc: Hurls a fiery ball that causes $d Fire damage plus additional damage over time.

abilities.name: Frost Armor
abilities.desc: Encases you in frost, increasing armor by 30 for 30 min.

abilities.name: Frostbolt
abilities.desc: Launches a bolt of frost, causing $d Frost damage and slowing movement by 40%.

abilities.name: Conjure Water
abilities.desc: Conjures 2 bottles of water, restoring mana when drunk. Higher ranks conjure purer water.

abilities.name: Conjure Food
abilities.desc: Conjures 2 servings of bread, restoring health when eaten. Higher ranks conjure heartier fare.

abilities.name: Fire Blast
abilities.desc: Blasts the enemy for $d Fire damage. Instant.

abilities.name: Arcane Missiles
abilities.desc: Launches Arcane Missiles at the enemy, causing $d Arcane damage each second for 3 sec.

abilities.name: Polymorph
abilities.desc: Transforms the enemy into a sheep for up to 15 sec. The sheep wanders and heals rapidly. Any damage breaks the effect. Beasts and humanoids only.

abilities.name: Frost Nova
abilities.desc: Freezes all nearby enemies in place for up to 8 sec, dealing $d Frost damage.

abilities.name: Arcane Explosion
abilities.desc: A burst of Arcane energy hits all nearby enemies for $d Arcane damage.

abilities.name: Scorch
abilities.desc: Scorches the enemy for $d Fire damage. Quick to cast.

abilities.name: Ice Barrier
abilities.desc: Shields you in ice, absorbing 130 damage for 60 sec.

abilities.name: Pyroblast
abilities.desc: Hurls an immense fiery boulder that causes $d Fire damage plus additional damage over time.

abilities.name: Flamestrike
abilities.desc: Calls down a burst of flame at the target area, dealing $d Fire damage to enemies caught in the blast.

playbook: You are playing a Mage (mana-based, ranged).
Goal: gain XP safely — kill mobs at or below your level, complete quests, stay alive.
SURVIVE: if HP < 25% and a mob is hitting you, flee or use a defensive; if safe and HP < 60%, eat/consume.
RESOURCE: if mana < 20% and out of combat, drink before pulling.
ENGAGE: pick the nearest hostile within range of your goal, close to ability range (face it), then attack.
ROTATE: cast the first ready ability in "rotation" each GCD (respect cost/cooldown/range/line-of-sight); auto-attack fills the gaps.
LOOT/QUEST: after a kill, loot the corpse; interact with quest objects/NPCs the objective needs.
Avoid pulling Elite/Rare mobs above your level, and don't pull more than you can handle.
